typeDescription.STANDARD: Regular parking spot suitable for most vehicles.

analytics.title: Lot preview (demo video)
analytics.helpText: Counts come from the analytics worker (YOLO + ENTRY/EXIT line crossing), not from the browser video clock. Press Play to reset counters and start polling updates.
analytics.errorAccess: Live preview is not configured for this parking, or you do not have access.
analytics.pressPlay: Press Play to start counting. The counters will reset to 0 and then update from the analytics worker.
analytics.noFreshUpdates: No fresh updates yet. If you're playing the video but nothing changes, the worker is not posting live metrics.

widget.voiceUnsupported: Voice not supported in this browser

widget.genericError: ⚠️ Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
widget.rateLimited: ⏳ The AI is getting too many requests right now. Please wait a minute and try again.
widget.apiKeyInvalid: 🔑 The AI API key is invalid or expired. Please contact support.
widget.emptyResponse: 🤔 The AI returned an empty response. Please try rephrasing your question.
widget.badRequest: ❌ The request was malformed. Please try a shorter message.

slots.selectHint: Select a parking above to view its slots

hero.subtitle: Discover, reserve, and pay for parking with secure real-time availability. Urban mobility, simplified for the modern driver.
hero.badgeSubtitle: Live lots near you • updated in real time

why.title: Why Parkingo?
why.subtitle: Engineering calmer cities through clarity, speed, and trust.
why.clarityBody: No hidden fees. Transparent pricing for every lot, every time.
why.speedBody: Book in moments. Spend less time circling and more time where you need to be.
why.supportBody: On-site guards and in-app chat when you need help at the lot.

parkbot.title: Meet your personal parking assistant.
parkbot.intro: Introducing ParkBot — find space through natural chat, get suggestions, and complete booking flows without hunting through menus.
parkbot.demoUser: Find me parking near the station for 2 hours
parkbot.demoBot: I found 3 lots with availability. Tap to compare price and distance.
parkbot.feature1Body: Chat in the language you prefer — ParkBot keeps the conversation clear and actionable.
parkbot.feature2Body: Describe what you need — ParkBot helps narrow lots, slots, and timing in one flow.

bento.title: Built for drivers
bento.findBody: See lots on the map with live availability so you can choose what fits your route.
bento.findAlt: In-car navigation and maps to find parking
bento.reserveBody: Book ahead. Your window is held until you arrive.
bento.reserveAlt: Quick check-in at the parking entrance
bento.payBody: Wallet checkout with clear hourly pricing — fewer taps from search to paid.
bento.payAlt: Choosing a payment method in the Parkingo app

audiences.driversBody: Find, book, and get to your spot with less stress — built for commuters and visitors.
audiences.ownersBody: List your parking, manage availability, and grow occupancy with tools made for operators.
audiences.guardsBody: Coordinate on-site activity, chat with drivers, and stay aligned with lot teams.

download.subtitle: Real-time availability, reservations, and guard chat — in your pocket. Use the same account on web and mobile.
download.note: Store links go here when the apps are published — for now, use the web app after sign in.
